semantic_status: Predictive and descriptive association atlas for fully automated model-derived image traits. Coefficients and validation metrics do not establish causal adaptation, trait evolution, or pollinator-mediated selection.

measurement_modes.meaning: One model-ensemble winner per observation and trait, retaining measurement-status provenance upstream.
Strict cross-model/cross-view consensus above the predeclared margin threshold.

climate_only.description: L2-regularized binary logistic classifier for each trait state versus all other analyzable states of the same trait. Predictor values are standardized within each fit.
climate_only.interpretation: Descriptive climate-associated discrimination, potentially confounded by species composition and spatial structure.

species_adjusted_within_species.description: L2-regularized binary logistic classifier including taxon dummy variables. Fit only to species with observed within-species variation in the focal state.
species_adjusted_within_species.interpretation: Within-observed-species association diagnostic. It is not a phylogenetic comparative model and is not evaluated on unseen species.

rules: Climate-only models are evaluated with grouped spatial-block folds and grouped species folds separately.
Species-adjusted models are evaluated only with grouped spatial-block folds, scoring test observations only when their species was represented with within-species outcome variation in training data.
Folds lacking both binary classes are retained in the fold table as unscorable rather than silently discarded.

sensitivity.coordinate_precision: Repeat interpretation only after comparing the full coordinate-eligible cohort to the <=10 km positional-accuracy subset.
sensitivity.measurement_stability: Treat agreement between all-ensemble and conservative modes as a required robustness diagnostic.
sensitivity.spatial_structure: Do not claim generalization if spatial-block validation is poor even when random-like discrimination is high.
